name: std-agent-builder
description: Agent app builder: prompt-driven plan/build/fix loop. Pick for NL app generators.

schema.name: std-agent-builder
schema.description: Agent app builder: prompt-driven plan/build/fix loop. Pick for NL app generators.

fields.name: task
fields.description: A description of the task being performed.

fields.name: category
fields.description: A classification or grouping for the build plan.

fields.name: steps
fields.description: Ordered sequence of actions to achieve a goal.

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: A numerical value representing the certainty of a result.

fields.name: status
fields.description: The current state or condition of the build plan.

fields.name: relevantMemories
fields.description: A reference to related memory entries.
fields.synonyms: memory reference, memory link, memory ID

fields.name: memoryCount
fields.description: The number of associated memories.

fields.name: error
fields.description: Textual description of an error or failure.

fields.name: input
fields.description: Data provided as an initial value or query.

fields.name: prompt
fields.description: The text used to initiate or guide a process.

fields.name: response
fields.description: The text output generated by a language model.

fields.name: provider
fields.description: Identifies the source or origin of the data.

fields.name: model
fields.description: The underlying data model used for the plan.

fields.name: content
fields.description: The textual data associated with a specific item.

fields.name: scope
fields.description: The area or domain this plan applies to.

fields.name: strength
fields.description: Numerical measure of reliability or effectiveness.

fields.name: pinned
fields.description: Indicates whether the item is marked for prioritized access.

fields.name: action
fields.description: The specific action to be performed.

fields.name: detail
fields.description: A more in-depth explanation or specification.

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Date and time of the event or record creation.

fields.name: duration
fields.description: The length of time an operation took.

fields.name: icon
fields.description: A visual representation, often a graphic, for identification.

effects: Classify this task into exactly one category.
Generate a numbered step-by-step execution plan.
Include a confidence score (0-100) for how likely this plan will succeed.

fields.name: task
fields.description: A brief description of the work to be performed.

fields.name: plan
fields.description: The overall strategy or outline for achieving a goal.

fields.name: iterations
fields.description: The number of times a process repeats.

fields.name: maxIterations
fields.description: The maximum number of iterations allowed.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current state of the process or item.

fields.name: result
fields.description: The outcome or output of a process or operation.

fields.name: currentTool
fields.description: The name of the tool currently being used.

fields.name: lastToolResult
fields.description: The output or data returned by the last tool execution.

fields.name: error
fields.description: Textual description of an error or issue encountered.

fields.name: currentStep
fields.description: The index of the currently executing step.
fields.synonyms: step number, step index, current task

fields.name: totalSteps
fields.description: The total number of steps involved in the process.

fields.name: steps
fields.description: Ordered sequence of actions to achieve a goal.

fields.name: toolName
fields.description: The name of the tool used in this step.

fields.name: args
fields.description: Arguments passed to a function or process.

fields.name: prompt
fields.description: The text used to initiate or guide a process.

fields.name: response
fields.description: The text output generated by a language model.

fields.name: provider
fields.description: Identifies the source or origin of the data.

fields.name: model
fields.description: The underlying language model used for processing.

fields.name: tokenCount
fields.description: The number of tokens used.

fields.name: maxTokens
fields.description: The maximum number of tokens allowed for a given operation.
fields.synonyms: token limit, max length, token count

fields.name: usage
fields.description: Indicates the number of times this resource has been utilized.

fields.name: current
fields.description: The present value of a numerical measurement or count.

fields.name: max
fields.description: The maximum allowable value for a numerical property.

fields.name: threshold
fields.description: A numerical value representing a limit or boundary.

fields.name: lastCompactedAt
fields.description: Timestamp of the last compaction event.

fields.name: action
fields.description: The operation to be performed.

fields.name: detail
fields.description: A more detailed explanation or description of the item.

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Date and time of the event or record creation.

fields.name: duration
fields.description: The length of time an operation took.

children.content: Describe the task to execute with tools

effects: Generate a step-by-step plan. Return the first tool to call and its arguments.

emits.description: Signals a tab selection has occurred.

events.name: Tab Changed

orientation.label: Orientation
orientation.description: Horizontal strip or vertical rail layout

bodyContent.label: Body content tree
bodyContent.description: Render-ui SExpr rendered for the tabs surface. Default is the canonical tabs pattern bound to @entity.items / @entity.activeTab. Layer 3 variants override this with their own tree (segmented-pill bar, vertical sidebar rail, etc.) while inheriting the same trait, state machine, emits, and listens.

defaultTab.label: Default tab
defaultTab.description: Tab id selected on first render

tabs.label: Tabs
tabs.description: Tab entries with id, label, icon, badge, and optional content trait

variant.label: Tab style
variant.description: Visual style of the tab strip
